2379200.name: Sol Uknight
2379200.description:
The game is a 3D-RPG, Puzzle, Adventure. The story is centered around two main protagonist, from opposite sides of their universe connected through time. The game takes us on an adventure through action based questing and storytelling to save themselves and each other in the ultimate struggle to acquire the Crown of Knight to bring balance back to the realm.

I will want to edit this description in the future, with some imagery and map icons of the over story narrative as to to allude to story narrative side of the game, which has a greater game Lore concept, and world building narratives like LOTR or other fantasy novels.
2379200.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
